lastReleaseMessage: M5 (partial): importer registry. chase-csv + amex-csv + statement-text presets.

barRaise.topFinding: Hono API at `apps/api/src/server.ts:1039` calls `serve()` without a `hostname`, so Node binds to all interfaces. CORS only blocks browsers; anyone on the LAN can read every transaction over HTTP. One-line fix to set `hostname: "127.0.0.1"` and a regression test; lands ahead of the rest of this week's work.
